data.name: Anu Taila Nasal Drops
data.short_description: Anu Taila Nasal Drops – an Ayurvedic oil for relieving nasal congestion, sinusitis, and related upper respiratory issues.
data.description:
Anu Taila is a medicated sesame oil infused with herbs like Devadaru and Chandana. It provides relief from nasal blockages, headaches, and strengthens the senses for better respiratory health.

Craftsmanship and attention to detail lie at the heart of Anu Taila. Every batch is meticulously processed to ensure the potency of the herbal infusions. We understand that respiratory health isn't just about breathing; it's about feeling clear and vital. That's why this Taila is engineered to make you feel your absolute best daily.

One of the standout features of Anu Taila is the high-quality herbs used in its construction. We believe in offering more than just nasal drops; we offer a reliable companion for seasonal challenges. The superior quality of the ingredients guarantees effective relief from congestion. It accentuates your body's natural respiratory functions, allowing you to embrace a healthy lifestyle with grace and confidence.

Whether you're gearing up for allergy season or aiming for clearer sinuses, Anu Taila effortlessly adapts to your needs. Use it for Nasya therapy or as directed. The versatility of this oil knows no bounds, making it an essential in every modern household.

In a world where respiratory issues are prevalent, Anu Taila stands as a testament to timeless Ayurvedic wisdom. This isn't just an oil; it's an invitation to upgrade your respiratory health and embrace clarity with confidence. The traditional recipe takes you back to an era of natural healing, while seamlessly fitting into contemporary wellness.

So, why wait? Elevate your breathing, celebrate your senses, and step into the world with renewed vitality. Anu Taila is more than a product; it's an embodiment of the healthy, balanced individual you are. Experience the relief, revel in the tradition, and make a lasting impression on your well-being. Upgrade your regime, embrace the timeless appeal of herbal Ayurveda, and conquer daily life with grace and panache.
data.ingredients:
Key Ingredients:

  • Tila Taila (Sesame Oil Base): Nourishing carrier oil for nasal passages
  • Devadaru (Cedrus deodara): Anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties
  • Chandana (Sandalwood): Cooling and soothing for nasal mucosa
  • Tagara (Valerian): Calming effect on the nervous system
  • Bilva (Bael): Supports respiratory health
  • Yashtimadhu (Licorice): Soothes irritated nasal passages
  • Jeevanti (Leptadenia reticulata): Rejuvenating and strengthening
  • Krishna (Black Pepper): Enhances absorption and clears channels
data.dosage:
Recommended Usage (Nasya Therapy):

  • Morning Application: 2 drops in each nostril after brushing teeth
  • Evening Application: 2 drops in each nostril before bedtime
  • Method: Lie down with head tilted back, instill drops, and sniff gently
  • Frequency: Daily use recommended, especially during seasonal changes
  • Best Time: Empty stomach or at least 1 hour after meals
  • Post-Application: Rest for 2-3 minutes to allow absorption

Note: For chronic conditions, consult an Ayurvedic physician for extended therapy duration.
data.benefits:
Health Benefits:

  • Clears nasal congestion and blockages
  • Relieves sinusitis and rhinitis
  • Reduces headaches and migraines
  • Improves breathing and sense of smell
  • Strengthens voice quality
  • Prevents allergic rhinitis
  • Lubricates nasal passages
  • Supports healthy sleep patterns
  • Enhances mental clarity and focus
  • Beneficial for hair health and eyesight
  • Prevents premature graying of hair
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • For external nasal use only - do not ingest
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
  • Warm the bottle slightly by placing in warm water before use for better flow
  • Do not use during acute cold, fever, or nasal infections
  • Avoid use immediately after bath or head wash
  • Not recommended during pregnancy without medical consultation
  • Do not use if allergic to any ingredient
  • Keep out of reach of children
  • Avoid use during indigestion or immediately after heavy meals
  • Do not use on open wounds or bleeding nose
  • If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a physician
data.market_authorization:
Regulatory & Quality Information:

Anu Taila is a classical Ayurvedic formulation mentioned in ancient texts. Manufactured following traditional Taila Kalpana (oil preparation) methods with modern quality controls.

Product Classification: Classical Ayurvedic Medicated Oil

Manufacturing License: Compliant with Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

Quality Standards: Prepared as per Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India

Shelf Life: 36 months from date of manufacture

data.name: Maha Swarna Brahma Yog
data.short_description: Maha Swarna Brahma Yog – a Gold Bhasma fortified tablet for enhancing children's immunity, memory, and overall development.
data.description:
Maha Swarna Brahma Yog contains standardized Swarna Bhasma along with Brahmi and Shankhpushpi. It is designed for Swarna Prashan to boost intellect, longevity, and strength in children.

Craftsmanship and attention to detail lie at the heart of Maha Swarna Brahma Yog. Every tablet is meticulously processed to ensure the potency of the Swarna Bhasma and herbal extracts. We understand that children's health isn't just about growth; it's about building a strong foundation. That's why this Yog is engineered to make your child feel their absolute best.

One of the standout features of Maha Swarna Brahma Yog is the high-quality ingredients used in its construction. We believe in offering more than just a supplement; we offer a reliable companion for your child's development. The superior quality of Swarna Bhasma guarantees effective immunity boost. It accentuates your child's natural potential, allowing them to embrace learning with grace and confidence.

Whether you're preparing for school or aiming for better focus, Maha Swarna Brahma Yog effortlessly adapts to your needs. Administer it daily or on Pushya Nakshatra. The versatility of this tablet knows no bounds, making it an essential for every parent.

In a world where health supplements vary, Maha Swarna Brahma Yog stands as a testament to timeless Ayurvedic wisdom. This isn't just a tablet; it's an invitation to upgrade your child's wellness and embrace their potential with confidence. The traditional formula takes you back to ancient practices, while seamlessly fitting into modern parenting.

So, why wait? Elevate their health, celebrate their growth, and step into the future with confidence. Maha Swarna Brahma Yog is more than a product; it's an embodiment of the strong, intelligent child you nurture. Experience the benefits, revel in the tradition, and make a lasting impression on their well-being. Upgrade their regime, embrace the timeless appeal of Gold-fortified Ayurveda, and conquer challenges with grace and panache.
data.ingredients:
Key Ingredients:

  • Swarna Bhasma (Gold Ash): Precious metal preparation for immunity, intelligence, and longevity
  • Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri): Enhances memory, concentration, and cognitive development
  • Shankhpushpi (Convolvulus pluricaulis): Improves brain function and learning ability
  • Vacha (Acorus calamus): Supports speech development and mental clarity
  • Jatamansi (Nardostachys jatamansi): Calms the mind and reduces stress
  • Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera): Builds strength and vitality
  • Yashtimadhu (Glycyrrhiza glabra): Boosts immunity and respiratory health
  • Honey: Natural preservative with antimicrobial properties
data.dosage:
Recommended Dosage (Swarna Prashan):

  • Infants (0-1 year): ¼ tablet dissolved in honey or mother's milk
  • Children (1-5 years): ½ tablet with honey or warm milk
  • Children (5-12 years): 1 tablet with honey or warm milk
  • Best Time: Early morning on empty stomach, especially on Pushya Nakshatra days
  • Frequency: Daily or as per Pushya Nakshatra calendar (every 27 days)
  • Administration: Crush tablet and mix with honey for younger children
  • Duration: Can be given regularly for 1-3 years for optimal benefits

Note: Consult a pediatric Ayurvedic physician for personalized dosage based on child's age and constitution.
data.benefits:
Health Benefits for Children:

  • Enhances immunity and disease resistance
  • Improves memory, intelligence, and concentration
  • Promotes healthy physical growth and development
  • Strengthens digestive system and metabolism
  • Supports speech development and clarity
  • Enhances skin complexion and luster
  • Improves appetite and nutrient absorption
  • Builds stamina and physical strength
  • Reduces susceptibility to recurrent infections
  • Promotes healthy sleep patterns
  • Supports overall brain development
  • Traditional Swarna Prashan benefits as per Ayurveda
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • For pediatric use only - consult physician before use
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
  • Keep bottle tightly closed after use
  • Not recommended for children with known allergies to ingredients
  • Consult pediatrician if child has any chronic health condition
  • Do not exceed recommended dosage
  • Keep out of reach of children (to prevent accidental overdose)
  • Use under adult supervision
  • If any adverse reaction occurs, discontinue use and consult doctor
  • Not a replacement for balanced diet and healthy lifestyle
  • Best results when combined with proper nutrition and care
data.market_authorization:
Regulatory & Quality Information:

Maha Swarna Brahma Yog is a traditional Ayurvedic formulation prepared following classical Swarna Prashan guidelines. Manufactured using pharmaceutical-grade Swarna Bhasma with stringent quality controls.

Product Classification: Pediatric Ayurvedic Supplement

Manufacturing License: Compliant with Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

Quality Certifications: GMP Certified, Laboratory Tested

Swarna Bhasma: Prepared as per Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia standards

Shelf Life: 36 months from date of manufacture
